song.title: Am I A Soldier of the Cross
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Am I a soldier of the Cross— A follow’r of the Lamb? And shall I fear to own His cause, Or blush to speak His name?
[C] Chorus In the name, the precious name, Of Him who died for me, Through grace I’ll win the promised crown, Whate’er my cross may be.
[V2] 2) Must I be carried to the skies On flow’ry beds of ease, While others fought to win the prize And sailed through bloody seas?
[V3] 3) Are there no foes for me to face? Must I not stem the flood? Is this vile world a friend to grace, To help me on to God?
[V4] 4) Since I must fight if I would reign, Increase my courage, Lord! I’ll bear the toil, endure the pain, Supported by Thy Word
song.author: Isaac Watts
